extensionDescription.message: Kugadzirisa kwechiArab typography kune yega website. Inogadzirisa nzvimbo yemavara, inopinza mafonti akanaka echiArab, uye inogadzirisa nyaya dzekuburitsa dzinokonzeresa kuti chinyorwa chechiArab chiparadzane.

masterToggleAriaLabel.message: Gonesa kana kudzima chikamu cheArabic Type

letterSpacingNote.message: Nzvimbo yemavara inogadziriswa nguva dzose kuva 0 kudzivirira kuparadzana kwemavara echiArab. Ichi ndicho chikonzero chinowanzoitika chekuburitsa kwechiArab kwakaputsika pawebhu.

forceRTLDescription.message: Inomanikidza nzira yekurudyi-kuenda-kuruboshwe pazvimedu zvechinyorwa chechiArab. Gonesa kune mawebsite apo chiArab chinoratidzika zvisizvo kuruboshwe-kuenda-kurudyi.

diacriticsDescription.message: Inovandudza kuburitswa kwezviratidzo zvevhawero zvechiArab (tashkeel) kudzivirira kuchekwa pamusoro nepasi pemutsetse wechinyorwa.

siteFontOverrideLabel.message: Shandisa fonti yakasiyana pane ino webhusaiti

siteFontOverrideDescription.message: Sarudza fonti yakasiyana kune ino webhusaiti chete, ichipfuura pamusoro pekusarudza kwako fonti kwepasi rose.

fontSourceNote.message: Mafonti anopihwa neGoogle Fonts. Inoda kubatana kweinternet pakutanga kurodha.

fontPrivacyNote.message: Zvikumbiro zvefonti zvinotumirwa kumaseva eGoogle. Ona fonts.google.com/privacy.

statusGlobalMode.message: Kushandisa modhi yepasi rose — hunhu hwe lang/dir hwakawanikwa.

statusNoArabic.message: Hapana chinyorwa chechiArab chakaonekwa papeji ino.
